001.name: Project foundation — install deps, design system, component library
001.acceptance: npm run build passes, design tokens defined, Footer component created, Playwright installed

002.name: Homepage redesign — Option D editorial style with hero, features, social proof, CTA
002.acceptance: Homepage renders with editorial layout, hero section, feature highlights, CTA. Vision model score >= 7.

003.name: Alternative homepage styles — Options A, B, C on /styles/ pages
003.acceptance: 3 alternative homepage designs accessible at /styles/developer, /styles/warm-saas, /styles/data-forward. Each visually distinct.

004.name: Blog system upgrade — tags, pagination, RSS, improved post layout
004.acceptance: Blog listing page at /blog, posts have tags, RSS feed at /rss.xml, improved typography

005.name: SEO blog posts — 4 high-quality posts for content pillars
005.acceptance: 4 new markdown posts: churn guide, cancel flow examples, involuntary churn, why-free. Each 1500+ words with proper frontmatter.

006.name: Comparison pages — programmatic /compare/ and /alternatives/ pages
006.acceptance: 5+ comparison pages render with honest feature matrices, pricing comparisons, CTAs. SEO-optimized.

007.name: Interactive cancel flow demo widget
007.acceptance: Interactive demo at /demo showing a cancel flow in action. User can click through steps. Looks professional.

008.name: Churn calculator tool
008.acceptance: Interactive calculator at /tools/churn-calculator. User inputs MRR + churn rate, sees potential savings. Shareable.

009.name: Features page + developer docs page
009.acceptance: Features page with detailed feature descriptions. Docs page with code examples, integration guide.

010.name: Cancel flow templates gallery
010.acceptance: Template gallery at /templates with 5+ cancel flow templates. Each template has preview + code snippet.

011.name: SEO infrastructure — sitemap, robots.txt, OG images, structured data, GSC verification
011.acceptance: sitemap.xml generates all pages, robots.txt configured, GSC meta tag in head, JSON-LD on all pages, OG meta tags on all pages.

012.name: D1 database setup + waitlist API + waitlist form component
012.acceptance: D1 database created, waitlist table exists, POST /api/waitlist stores emails, WaitlistForm component works on homepage.

013.name: Mobile responsiveness pass + visual QA
013.acceptance: All pages look good at 390px, 768px, 1440px. Vision model scores >= 7 on all pages at all breakpoints.

014.name: Final polish — navigation, footer links, 404 page, loading states, favicon
014.acceptance: Navigation links work across all pages. Footer has sitemap links. 404 page styled. All internal links valid.
